text.title: Okr Cascade Team To Company — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team have 8-10 people, the company has published OKRs, and alignment review is scheduled before quarter start?

branch.when: team_size >= 8 AND team_size <= 10 AND company_okrs_published == true AND alignment_review_scheduled == true
branch.conclusion: Run the full cascade: company KR → team OBJ → team KRs + contribution map + dependencies + sign-off.
Block. Escalate to leadership; cascade without company OKRs has nothing to attach to.
Skip. Direct goal-setting + a single-page memo is cheaper than the cascade.
